name: frontload
description: Local-first context and cost gateway for AI coding agents.

scripts.demo:fixture: pnpm build && node dist/src/cli/index.js index --repo fixtures/react-ts-app && node dist/src/cli/index.js dossier "Fix stale chart tooltip value after sensor reconnect" --repo fixtures/react-ts-app --format markdown --budget 6000 > proof/sample-dossier.md && node dist/src/cli/index.js run --repo fixtures/react-ts-app --kind test -- pnpm test
scripts.proof: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm e2e && pnpm demo:fixture && node dist/src/cli/index.js proof --repo fixtures/react-ts-app
